titleStmt.title: SII 15.159: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 159. (B.K. No. 9 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the prakāra wall of the Trikūṭēśvara temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1135, Āṅgirasa, Phālguṇa śu. 2, Saturday, corresponding to 1213 A.D., February 23, Saturday f.d.t. °41. The year was current.

The inscription records that the Seventy two Mahājanas of Gadugu, situated in Beḷvala Three Hundred, made the gift of land, house and flower-gardens to the god Trikūṭēśvara with 528 gadyāṇas as suvarṇapūjā. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Kriyāśakti-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple and the disciple of Chandrabhūshaṇa-paṇḍita, whose spiritual genealogy is given. The earlier portion of record in Sanskrit contains description of the eminent Mahājanas of the great agrahāra of Kratuku (i.e., Gadugu) who are said to have officiated as priests in the Sarpayāga of Jamamējaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya śaṁbhavē .
varāha jayatya
vibhūṣaṇa caṁdrakaḷāsakaḷabhuvanamananavarataṁ . jagadānaṁdajayō prakaṭalakṣmī
viḷāsa . Asti dakṣiṇāpathē beḷvalatriśatamadhyē kratukō nāma mahāgrahāraḥ
© yaḥ kiḷa sakaḷabhūpāḷacūḍāmaṇinā pāṁḍukuḷatiḷakēna mahā
rājajanamējayēna sarppayāgē tapōvidyāvṛttasaṁpaṁnēbhyaḥ nānāgōtrē
bhyaḥ dvāsaptatyai brāhmaṇēbhyō dattaḥ . tatra ca nivasaṁti santatānuṣṭhīyamāna sa
mastavēdavēdāṁgamīmāṁsāsmṛtipurāṇētihāsa pāraṁgatāḥ . sarvvaśāstrabyākhyā tāraḥ
yajanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadāna pratigraha ṣaṭkarmmaniratāḥ . mahārāja janamējaya sarppa
yāgartvijaḥ . sakaḷakaḷākuśalāḥ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarāyamāṇāḥ . Āśritajane kalpa vṛkṣāḥ .
śrī trikoṭēśvaradēvaśrīpādapadmārādhakāḥ . śrīvīranārāyaṇadēvaśrīpādaprasādā sādita sama
sta mahimānō dvijanmānaḥ . vēdādhyayanapavitri sadācāravidhūtapāpmānaḥ Anavarata
yajūkāḥ kīrttisudhādhavaḷitadigaṁtāḥ śvaranāmadhēyaḥ śaśāṁkalēkhāvṛta
śēkharaśrīḥ . samastabhaktābhinuta punāti mūrtti rīśaḥ . tasya ca bhagavatastrikū
ṭēśvaradēvasya sthānē . Āḷaṁkṛta khānvavāyāḥ . siddhāṁtinaḥ Akhaṁḍita brahmacaryyavi
smāpitajagataḥ satyavākyāparanāmānaḥ kāḷūsipaṁḍita[�rabhṛ]tayō baha
vō babhūvurācāryya ca . sarbbāga budhiḥ samasta lōkastutasaccaritraḥ . Ā
cāryyavaryyō śiṣyō babhūva vidyā bhidhānaḥ tasya bhuvanamaṁ
mahimā śiṣyaḥ dugdhāṁbhōdhinalina sarvvakaḷā sphūrjjatkīrtti sudhāpra
vāhaḥ vihitatraiḷōkyaharuṣōdayaḥ . staṁbhitakalpabhūruhayaśaḥtyāgasarvvasva sarbbōṁnatiḥ śrīmān
paṁḍita caṁdrabhūṣaṇa Iti khyātō ya pratiḥ . puṇya kṛti sāmartthi
jaṁgamakalpavṛkṣa Iti yaḥ prā nyataḷō madhyēpi pṛthvībhu
kṣitipati nānābhūpā maṇiviḷasa
stasya trikūṭēśvarapādakamaḷārādhanaikapravīṇaḥ vidyānāṁ phāradṛśvā vijitamanasija rātiva
vidvadvṛṁdairajēyō jagati vijayatē śrī kriyāśaktidēvaḥ rāgāṁbhōdē rupacaya dōrmma
yūkhāḥ kā prōllasa kāminī nāṁ kaṭākṣa
yadēva muni hmacaryya . yasyāgamēṣu sarvvēṣunaipuṇī sēvyatāṁ satāṁ
tatpraṇētṟūṇāṁ vismaya . yasya . pratihatatapaḥ tapaprabhāvasya sakaḷaguṇa gaṇākaraḥ śi
ṣyaḥ śrīmannūtanacaṁdrabhūṣaṇa [I]ti guṇapriṇitō kṣōṇīmaṁḍaṟamaḍhya varttijanatāsaṁstūya
mānōdayaḥ . dēvasthānaviśōbhinaṁ kṣitipatiprō dataḥ kṛtvā manyamakhiḷaṁ
trāyatē . yaṁ cānanyasādhāraṇāgamaparijñānamahā nāgama
mārgānprakaṭayatu śiṣyajanadayāḷutayā lakuḷīśa Ēvva vatīrṇna
dāḥ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ yādava nārāyaṇaṁ
śrīmaṁtsiṁgaṇadēvarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamira śaka
nṛpakāḷākrāṁtasaṁvatsaraśataṁgaḷu 1135 neya Āṁgira saṁvatsarada phālguṇa śuda bidige śanaiścara
vāradaṁdu śrīmadagrahāra gaduginaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu Eppattirvvaru sabālavṛddharu tammoḷēka
matya śrī svayaṁbhu trikūṭēśvaradēvarige Ā sthānadācāryya śrīmatsiddhāṁta kriyūśaktipaṁḍita
dēvara kayyalu Ainūṟa Ippatteṁṭu gadyāṇa honna suvarṇnapūjeyāgi koṁḍu pādaprakṣāḷa
nadhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi A gadugina Uraḍikeya prabhutvakke śrī mānyavāgi baḍagaṇa bhūmiyalli
koṭṭa keyi mūvattu mattaru grāmamadhyadalli hiriya mana Oṁdu Ūriṁ mūḍaṇa hūdōṭa 1
Ūriṁ paḍuvalu dēvara vīḷeyakke Eleyaḍakeya tōṭa Ā tōṭadiṁ mūḍalu māvinabana Ūriṁ teṁka
ṇa purada Uttaradigbhāgada bhūmiyella gōpracāravāgi koṭṭaru . dēvara puradiṁ mūḍaṇa bhū
miyella hoṟakēriyāgi koṭṭaru . sthāna perggaḍe Ūra taḷabhōgadāya gāṇāya ya māneṇne
mariyāde hūḍuvalliyuḍugoṟe caitradalli davanaparvvada
bīya kārapuṇnamiya parvva bīyamanaḷiyanugurahaṇa taḷāṟikeya sēse yikku . śrā
vaṇadalli pavitrārōpaṇada parvva bīya . dīpāvaḷiya parvva bīya śubha śōbhanagaḷalli yagrapūje
ceṟugodevaṇa tāṁbūḷava muṁci kuḍuvaru . Ūraḍeyaru mukhyavāgi grāmakā ryyava mā
ḍuvudu . vicārada mudrāpaṇa . śūdraruṁ kārukaruṁ biṭṭi besanaṁ māḍuvaru . śvēta cchatra cā
marasiṁhāsana pūdōṭa yintī Aṣṭabhōga tējasāmyada prabhutvavanu savva namasya sarvvabā
dhaparihāra śrīmānyavāgi dēvarige Ūraḍikeyaṁ koṭṭaru . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
